dosingInfo.rawDosageText: Directions Do not give more than 6 doses in any 24 hours period  shake well before use  measure only with dosing cup provided  keep dosing cup with product  mL = milliliter Age Dose Children 6 to under 12 years of age 5 mL every 4 hours Children 4 to under 6 years of age 2.5 mL every 4 hours Children under 4 years of age Do not use
